overall.description: A stationary third-person view from a video game depicting a gothic medieval dining hall with high vaulted ceilings, stone walls, and long wooden tables. Students in dark robes sit at the tables while one character walks through the left side of the frame. The atmosphere is dim and atmospheric with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic dining hall with house tables

events.description: student in dark robes walks across the left side of the hall from foreground to background

agents.ego_description: stationary, seated at the table observing the dining hall interior

notable_agents.action: walking from left foreground toward the background, passing between tables

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and dark wooden beams
ornate hanging chandeliers with multiple candle-style lights suspended from ceiling
long dark wood dining tables with benches arranged in rows
simple wooden bench seating along the tables
grey stone wall with vertical wooden paneling on lower half
portrait paintings in ornate frames hanging on the stone wall
elaborately carved wooden cabinet with decorative objects on top

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic dining hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone walls. Several students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables. At around 9.5 seconds, a student walks across the left side of the frame from near to far. The scene is lit by a mix of window light and hanging chandeliers, creating a dim, atmospheric medieval ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric perspective of a gothic dining hall that remains constant as a single figure disrupts the stillness. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, where high vaulted ceilings and stone walls loom over students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. As the dim light from hanging chandeliers and distant windows casts deep shadows across the medieval interior, the stillness is broken by a student walking across the left side of the frame. The camera lingers on the scene as the figure moves from the foreground toward the distance, finally leaving the hall to return to its quiet, moody ambiance.
